testcase.name: Walmart mobile web › loads the mobile homepage
testcase.system-out: > Connect Playwright to BrowserStack Android device > Stop any existing Chrome session > Launch Chrome on BrowserStack Android device

testcase.name: Walmart mobile web › searches for laptop from the mobile homepage
testcase.system-out:
> Connect Playwright to BrowserStack Android device > Stop any existing Chrome session > Launch Chrome on BrowserStack Android device
[[ATTACHMENT|mobile-walmart-search-Walm-1ea6c-op-from-the-mobile-homepage/error-context.md]]
testcase.failure:
